creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

The bug applies to all ash(1) builtin commands: 

alias 
bg 
command 
cd 
eval 
exec true 
export name 
fc 
fg 
getopts optstring var 
hash  
jobid 
jobs 
read 
readonly name 
set 
setvar variable value 
shift 
trap true 1 
ulimit 
umask 
unalias 
unset name 
wait 
~
